# IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode.fileBased

**Case**

Transferred files will be saved to disk by the delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
case fileBased
```

## Constants

- **IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode.memoryBased**: Transferred files will be supplied to the delegate as an `NSData` object.
